Source   Edit  

Imports

stringresize

Types

Artery = object
  buffer*: string
  bufferConsumer*: proc (x: openArray[char]): int ## returns number of characters consumed
                                                  ## assumed that something is wrong if 0 characters consumed
  freeBefore*: int
Source   Edit

    forbids: [].}
